text: I feel a curious mix of anticipation and slight disorientation. The first image, a view into a modern glass room with neatly stacked chairs and equipment, suggests preparation—perhaps for a meeting or presentation—imbued with silent expectation. The second image, a vivid wall display about responsive and innovative research, sparks my intellectual curiosity. Among bright colors and bold letters, I feel drawn in, inspired by the idea of development and discovery. Being here, I feel on the edge of something not yet started, surrounded by the artifacts and ambitions of human inquiry.
